title.en: DeepMind leadership says society has only a few years to prepare
title.zh: DeepMind 负责人称社会只剩几年准备时间

body.en: A frontier-lab leader frames AGI as something to prepare for soon, not someday.
body.zh: 前沿实验室负责人把 AGI 说成了需要尽快准备的事，而不是很遥远的概念。

title.en: OpenAI says it knows how to build traditionally understood AGI
title.zh: OpenAI 称已知道如何构建传统意义上的 AGI

body.en: A strong public confidence marker, though not the same thing as shipping it.
body.zh: 这是一个很强的公开信心信号，但还不等于已经真正做出来。

title.en: Coding agents become useful daily tools
title.zh: 编码智能体成为日常可用工具

body.en: Coding agents make autonomy feel less like a demo and more like a daily workflow.
body.zh: 编码智能体让“自主执行”不再只是演示，而是开始进入日常工作流。

title.en: Benchmarks saturate faster than definitions stabilize
title.zh: 基准刷得很快，定义稳得很慢

body.en: Leaderboards are useful, but the clock should not chase every benchmark headline.
body.zh: 排行榜有参考价值，但这只钟不能每看到一个榜单标题就跟着乱跳。
